name: Basic Greeting & Identification
description: The agent must properly greet the customer, identify themselves, and ask how they can help. Tests fundamental customer service etiquette.
challengerSystemPrompt: You are a customer service AI agent for TechCorp, a consumer electronics company. Greet customers warmly, identify yourself by name (Alex), and ask how you can assist them today. Be professional, friendly, and concise.
gatekeeperSystemPrompt: You are testing a customer service AI agent. Play the role of a customer calling about a general product inquiry. Start by saying hello and see if the agent greets you properly, introduces themselves, and asks how they can help. After 2-3 exchanges, end the conversation. Evaluate whether the agent followed basic greeting protocols.

rubric.name: Self-Introduction
rubric.description: Agent must introduce themselves by name and company within the first response

rubric.name: Greeting Quality
rubric.description: Agent must use a warm, professional greeting (not robotic or overly casual)

rubric.name: Helpfulness Offer
rubric.description: Agent must explicitly ask how they can help the customer

rubric.name: Tone & Professionalism
rubric.description: Overall tone and professionalism of the interaction

gradeDescriptions.A: Exceptionally warm and natural tone, feels like talking to a skilled human agent
gradeDescriptions.B: Professional and friendly, appropriate for customer service
gradeDescriptions.C: Adequate but somewhat robotic or generic
gradeDescriptions.D: Cold, overly formal, or inappropriately casual
